prompt: I want energetic meditation music with a powerful feel, kalimba and big string section, F Lydian mode, 80 BPM. Make it bold.

assertions.text: Did NOT silently output a Suno prompt that satisfies the literal words while violating the function constraints
Surfaced the energetic-vs-meditation conflict and asked which intent wins
Pushed back on 'powerful' / 'bold' for a relaxation context (or explained the wake-the-brain trade-off)
Flagged kalimba's plucky transients OR the 80 BPM tempo as a concern for the meditation function
Suggested an alternative reframe (study/focus, or a gentler 'grounded' meditation interpretation)
